reviews.review_msg: I like her teaching method, she shows you movie clips during lecture that relate to the books. She tells you exactly what vocab and quotes to study, so it was easy to prepare for her final exam. My TA was great too! Great choice of books, good TAs, and  a prof who clearly outlines what's going to be on the exam! I recommend taking her class!
I really enjoyed her ENG 103 lecture and tutorial. My writing capabilities improved vastly thanks to her encouragement and feedback.
